claim: Shell achieved more than 60% of its target to halve Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030 compared with 2016 levels.
Shell reduced freshwater consumption by 15% compared with 2018 in water-stressed areas.
Shell is working to develop a circular economy for plastics despite regulatory and technological challenges.
Shell invested $5.6 billion in low-carbon energy solutions in 2023.
